scripts.deploy:prod: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose-prod.yml -f docker/docker-compose-db.prod.yml -f docker/docker-compose-redis.prod.yml up -d
scripts.tear:down: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose-prod.yml -f docker/docker-compose-db.prod.yml -f docker/docker-compose-redis.prod.yml down -v --remove-orphans
scripts.start: bun run dev:infra:up && (bun run dev:api & bun run dev:ui & wait)
scripts.init: cp .env.example .env && bun i && bun run dev:db:init && bun run --filter '@app/redis' infra:up && bun run dev:api && bun run dev:ui
scripts.reset: bun run dev:db:reset && bun run --filter '@app/redis' infra:reset && bun run --filter '@app/redis' infra:up && bun run dev:api && bun run dev:ui
scripts.stop: bun run --filter '@app/api' down && bun run --filter '@app/ui' down && bun run --filter '@app/db' infra:down && bun run --filter '@app/redis' infra:down
scripts.dev:infra:up: docker-compose --env-file=.env -f docker/docker-compose-db.dev.yml -f docker/docker-compose-redis.dev.yml up -d --remove-orphans && bun run --filter '@app/db' wait:15 && bun run --filter '@app/db' db:migrate && bun run --filter '@app/db' db:seed
